insights.title: Crude complex surges 10%+; Brent and WTI hit 52-week highs
insights.detail: Brent settled $141.37/bbl (+10.1%), WTI $111.54 (+11.4%), Murban $114.84 (+10.8%). All three benchmarks moved in lockstep on Hormuz escalation.

insights.title: Gasoil-Murban crack explodes to $170/bbl on refinery squeeze
insights.detail: Gasoil surged 19.5% to new 52W high of $284.97; crack over Murban widened $65 in 5 days from $105 to $170, signaling acute diesel scarcity.

insights.title: AWRP hits 52W high at $2.45/bbl ahead of Apr 6 deadline
insights.detail: Platts war risk premium up 44% in 5 days to new high; hull-rate steady at 5% with 2.5% transit surcharge. Apr 6 deadline adds uncertainty.

insights.title: Brent-Murban spread blows out to $26.5/bbl on transit risk
insights.detail: Gulf-origin Murban within 0.2% of 52W high but Brent pulled far ahead to new record; widening spread reflects rerouting premium and Hormuz avoidance.
